raw_consumer_statement:
Im filing this complaint because I feel like Im being held responsible for something that is clearly not my fault.

I used my American Express card to purchase XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX graphics cards from XXXX, totaling about {$7700.00}. The carrier marked the items as delivered, but I never received them. I checked immediately and the packages were not there, and I never had possession of them at any point. 

Because of how expensive these items were, I filed a police report. I also contacted XXXX, but they refused to refund or replace the items and told me to go through my credit card company. 

I had a similar issue with a XXXX monitor that was also marked as delivered but never received. In that case, XXXX reviewed everything and gave me a refund, which makes it even more frustrating that this situation is being handled differently. 

When I filed a dispute with American Express, I provided all the information I had, including the police report and order details. Despite that, they denied my claim and are relying only on the carrier saying the items were delivered.

I dont understand how I can be expected to pay for items I never received. There was no signature required, no proof the packages were actually handed to me, and nothing showing I ever had them. 

Im not trying to get out of a charge or return something I simply never got what I paid for.

I even asked American Express to take another look at this as a goods not received situation and refund the charges from XXXX. It didnt work And what makes it worse is they no as a XXXX  personnel that barely be home that have submitted there orders there aware of why I wasnt there
